{{Item
| image = Creative collar.png
| id = creative_collar
| type = Creative Exclusive
| stackable = 64
}}
[[File:Creative Collar negative points demo.png|thumb|''notice how the points are negative'']]
'''Creative Collar''' is an equipable item that bypasses the talent points limit.
== Obtaining ==
Press '''<code>E</code>''' in Creative mode to access the Creative menu.
== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
* Glint added in DTN 1.15.0
